title: Murder by an Aristocrat
writer: Luci Ward, Roy Chanslor, Mignon G. Eberhart
actors: Lyle Talbot, Marguerite Churchill, Claire Dodd
plot: Bayard Thatcher is blackmailing the family into which he has married: He demands $25,000 by the next night or else he will tell about shady deals and family skeletons. That is the price the bully Bayard demands for leaving the fam...
